top_signals.title: China Draws Foreign Inflows After Brief Iran War-Led Outflow
top_signals.summary: China’s cross-border inflow resumed in April following a reversal in March, reinforcing confidence in the economy and an appreciating yuan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Holding Off on New Iran Strikes After Gulf Appeal
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump said he called off a strike on Iran after an appeal by the leaders of Persian Gulf allies, who called for more time to pursue a diplomatic resolution.. Bloomberg's Stuart Livingstone-Wallace shares what we know. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
